update: Redesigned the visible UI to closely match the attached mockups: the home page now uses the centered white welcome card, the login and register pages use the blue split-card layouts, a new OTP verification screen matches the confirmation mockup, and the desktop shell now uses the simple top bar plus centered dock styling. The production build still passes after the redesign.
next: Fine-tune spacing, typography, and interactions if you want a stricter pixel match, then continue with GSAP motion and any remaining IDE polish. After each major step I’ll refresh this file.
problems: I had to rewrite a broken Window component while iterating on the desktop mockup, but it’s fixed and the build is green again. The design match is now close to the screenshots, though tiny pixel-perfect adjustments may still be needed if you want exact parity.
